'''Sirilla''' was the fourth and outermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Cirius system/Legends|Cirius system]]. It was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by 17 [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="CatCW" />

==History==
During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]], a [[Mining station/Legends|mining station]] in the orbit above Sirilla got into a storm of electrons which destroyed the entire [[Droid/Legends|droid]]-crew.<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Scavenging|Short Sharp Shock}}</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
